name: exa-search
description: Neural/semantic web search: embeddings-ranked results with relevant highlights and extracted content, plus single-URL content retrieval. Good for discovering non-obvious sources. API key from exa.ai.
author: PersonalClaw

x-meta.label: Exa API Key
x-meta.help: Your Exa API key (exa.ai). Leave empty to fall back to the EXA_API_KEY environment variable.

x-meta.label: Request Timeout
x-meta.help: Maximum seconds to wait for a search/contents response.
